title: Infuse SMP S3 Texture Pack
description: The Official Infuse SMP Texture Pack
body:
This is the Infuse SMP S2 Texture Pack. It adds all the textures from the Infuse SMP.

Effects:
- Fire
- Ocean
- Invis
- Strength
- Haste
- Thunder
- Heart
- Emerald
- Feather
- Frost
- Regen
- Speed
- Ender
